## Overview

HOMELAB — Generate docker-compose stacks for AI development.
Ollama, Open WebUI, Flowise, n8n, Jupyter, Weaviate, Qdrant, monitoring.

Usage:
  homelab generate                    Interactive stack builder
  homelab quick                       Quick-start: Ollama + WebUI
  homelab list

| Signature | Description |

| `dump_compose(stack: dict)` | Serialize docker-compose dict to YAML-like text (no deps). |

| `generate_stack(selected: list)` | Build docker-compose config for selected services. |
| `cmd_generate(args)` | Interactive stack builder. |
| `cmd_list(args)` | List available services. |
| `cmd_serve(args)` | Validate docker-compose file. |
